model.input: delta_b Bx/By/Bz plus constant sensor_z_m scalar
model.loss: 25.11 rebalance: keep existence/geometry losses but emphasize active component and union mask/depth terms with foreground-normalized supervision.
model.outputs: K=3 existence, center_xy, L/W/D, rotation, shape_family, component mask, component depth grid

route_decision: B. run 25.11b targeted rebalance or topology-focused failure audit
